rows.title: Journal — 9/27/25 — Saturday
rows.content_markdown: First journal entry. Asked "who is Jackson?" — felt like he'd been wearing a mask so long he became the mask. Didn't know who was underneath. Felt pieces of himself come out when he saw *her* that night (someone from high school) — said it felt natural, not like he had to perform to be liked. Declared he was ready to wake up and live his own God-given life, not float through it. Realized he was lost but not depressed. Wrote: *"Self love is the cure to self hate."* Noted fear of getting close with God even though he wanted to.

rows.title: Journal — 9/28/25 — Sunday
rows.content_markdown: Questioned whether he was a good guy. Felt unwanted — like he had everyone else's back but no one had his (except family). Felt like he was just *there* and no one actually wanted to hang out with him one on one. Wrote "it sucks" and signed it.

rows.title: Journal — 9/29/25 — Monday
rows.content_markdown: Rough day. Completely in his head, unbelievably anxious. Didn't go to class. Used the time to study instead. Tried everything — went back to the Bible (not selfishly, just needed answers), exercised, tried to push through. Felt like he was doing everything wrong. Lonely. Everyone around him had someone they loved. Frustrated that every female friend either liked him or he liked them — exhausting dynamic. Went to Panda Express, went to the gym.

rows.title: Journal — 10/1/25 — Wednesday
rows.content_markdown: Studied for Gov exam, felt he did well. Threw his weed out — tired of the life he was living. Felt lonely, especially watching everyone around him have girlfriends. Missed his mom. Grateful for everything she does. Wrote: *"There is about to be a huge change. I'm old enough where I need to be locked in."*

rows.title: Journal — 10/13/25 — Monday
rows.content_markdown: Wrote "good luck buddy, we'll see how this one turns out" to himself. Lost again — inside his own mind 75% of the day. Praying daily for it to get better but still feels the same. Then wrote: *"I may have met my wife — she's stated not wanting a relationship but she has not seen the BE absolute 100% JPB."* (Bailey Edwards — first mention.)

rows.title: Journal — 10/17/25 — Tuesday (misdated)
rows.content_markdown: Felt like he needed to get his life together. Every best friend had found a great girlfriend. Felt lonely — not even lonely but *falling behind* everyone else. Didn't fit in any group besides his own. Wrote in big letters: **"I have got to get a plan for my life."**

rows.title: Journal — 10/19/25 — Sunday
rows.content_markdown: Made a 56 on AP2 test — way worse than expected. Found Bailey Edwards. Described her as very God-driven, absolutely wife material, scared she only sees him as a friend. Listed everything about her — favorite color purple, flowers: daisies/hydrangeas/hibiscus, twin brother Ethan, loves cats, country music, Mexican food, allergic to smoke. Wrote *"I Love Doesn't Exist"* then crossed it out. Said *"I truly admire her."*

rows.title: Journal — 10/27/25
rows.content_markdown: Bailey got very distant. Hurt. In bad judgment posted a pic with another girl on Instagram — petty move, knew it. Feared anything between them was gone. Sidenote: she sent a pic with her roommate and he saved it. *"I might just be playing mind games."*

rows.title: Journal — 10/27/25 — Monday Morning, 11:30am
rows.content_markdown: Bailey rejected him the night before. Called him a shitty person for what he did to Jansen. Hurt but also numb — questioned if he'd been depressed. Still didn't want to stop pursuing. Wrote: *"I don't know what to do. I hate having a bad reputation."*

rows.title: Journal — 10/28/25
rows.content_markdown: In his head about everything. Didn't think he was wrong in the Jansen situation — told her from the start he didn't want a relationship. Couldn't believe she called him a pathological liar. Felt like he was slightly losing himself daily, getting overall down and didn't know how to pull out.

rows.title: Journal — 11/2/25
rows.content_markdown: Complete 180. *"Genuinely might be my top 2 weeks of my life."* Stopped talking to Bailey — sucked, but a lot happened and life was becoming peak. Noticed Ava Field from Auburn Danceline. Ordered an iced medium Blondie from 7 Brew.

rows.title: Journal — 11/8/25 — Saturday
rows.content_markdown: Weird week. Went to the bar with Dev Patel, great night until they needed a ride. Asked Ella Dupree (ex talking stage) for a ride home. Left his phone in her car. She held it hostage. He barged through the door to grab it and accidentally broke her toes. Felt terrible. Mom said he was in the right. Got really sick — 103-104 fever, sweats, puking. Life felt like death itself. *"Day by day life gets harder and I am getting tired."*

rows.title: Journal — 11/20/25
rows.content_markdown: Still getting more and more tired. Wrote *"Damn days of it"* in red.

rows.title: Journal — 11/22/25 — Saturday
rows.content_markdown: *"It is getting really really hard. I'm trying my best but I don't know how much more I have left in me at this point. Every day is a struggle and I'm getting exhausted."* Wrote *"Cry me a fucking river"* underneath — both self-deprecating and determined.

rows.title: Journal — 11/23/25 — Sunday
rows.content_markdown: *"Still really hard. I don't know what to do."*

rows.title: Journal — 11/27/25 — Thanksgiving
rows.content_markdown: *"Sometimes I just feel so out of place even at my own family's Thanksgiving."* Struggling with seasonal depression. Felt out of his own life for what felt like forever. Couldn't remember the last time he felt like Jackson Pate. Not alone on paper but *"I am ALONE."* Emptiness deep in his chest. Drew a sad and happy face side by side. Wrote *"When will I be better? Will I ever be?"* and *"I'm about to lose my mind."*

rows.title: Journal — 12/4/25 — Thursday
rows.content_markdown: *"I genuinely think I might be losing my mind. I am losing my mind. I can't think straight. I'm on copilot."* Then later wrote next to it: *"What a pussy I was, wow."* — growth in retrospect.

rows.title: Journal — 12/8/25 — Monday
rows.content_markdown: Starting to feel a lot better. Realized he was going insane because he wasn't busy. Now swamped. No new women — slightly disappointing. But overall chilling.

rows.title: Journal — 1/29/26
rows.content_markdown: Nursing instructor said: *"A C from Auburn is an A from everywhere else."* One line. Locked in.

rows.title: Journal — 2/2/26 — Monday
rows.content_markdown: *"Everything in life is truly great. I have zero idea what changed from last semester to this one but life is truly amazing."*

rows.title: Journal — 2/8/26 — Eye Exam
rows.content_markdown: Found out he needed glasses. Symptoms: sees double especially white words on black backgrounds on digital devices, sees streaks of lights at night when driving (really bad in rain), hard to see small words after 4 feet, eyes hurt really bad after extended screen time.

rows.title: Journal — 2/24/26
rows.content_markdown: Bored in NURS 2030 class. Packed down with things to study. Looked back at his old journals and wrote: *"What a pussy I was."* — full circle moment.

rows.title: Journal — 3/1/26
rows.content_markdown: Reminder to self: bring Ms. Lisa a Ron Jon Panama City sticker and Sex Wax chapstick.

rows.title: Journal — 3/9/26
rows.content_markdown: Started watching Peaky Blinders to finish before the movie. Already hooked on episode 2. *"Genuinely peak cinema."*

rows.title: Journal — 3/15/26
rows.content_markdown: Got Ms. Lisa her things. Won $405 on Betr overall but lost $55 on poker — still up overall. PCB trip rated 10/10 so far. Daniel Sosa pulling up to PCB the next day — hadn't seen him in a long time, hoping he's still cool.

rows.title: What Jackson Has Shared Personally
rows.content_markdown:
## Identity & The Real Fear
- Biggest fear isn't wasted potential — it's **not being good enough**. The deeper fear is trying everything and still not being enough.
- Biggest lie he tells himself: *"I should already have it figured out."*
- Sees everyone as better than him. That's the internal story nobody sees.
- Keeps people at a distance because he's scared if they see the real him they won't like what they find.
- Feels like a side character in everyone else's story — but wants desperately to matter in someone's life.
- Nobody fully gets how much he's in his head second-guessing everything he does and says.

## Faith
- Believes in Christianity — heaven, purpose, something bigger.
- Faith brings both peace and pressure. The guilt is real.
- Feels scared to get close with God and doesn't fully know why.

## Family
- Doesn't share the same ideologies as his family and probably never will.
- Brother Cameron has spina bifida — feels Cameron has wasted potential due to laziness, enabled by their mom.
- Auburn was freedom from all of it. First time he felt truly himself.
- *"Absofuckinglutely. I have become more than what I ever thought I could be — not just academically but as a person."*

## Ethan Arce
- Most trusted person in his life. Lives in Oklahoma.
- Similar in almost every way except: Ethan isn't religious, and Ethan sees people as beneath him while Jackson sees everyone as better than him.
- Even Ethan doesn't know about the "not good enough" fear. Nobody does.

## Emotional Processing
- Processes emotions analytically, not expressively. Often misread as emotionally detached — actually feels deeply.
- Thinks then feels, not the other way around.
- Prone to overthinking but rarely impulsive.
- Doesn't guard emotions — just chooses very carefully who gets that version of him.

## The Emma Arc (March–April 2026)
- Emma Williard — talked for 6 months in high school before she dated Frey for 1.5 years.
- March 6th 2026: Ran into each other at a bar. Talked for 4 hours. Stayed at her place until 4:30am. Realized he's in love with her.
- Her mom already knew his name. He's #2 on her Snapchat best friends list (after her mom).
- Treaty Oak Revival rodeo concert — she told him to find her. Spent the night with her group, danced together, drove her home sober, asked her on a date. She said yes.
- Emma said she wants something but is scared of being hurt. He told her he wouldn't hurt her.
- Fell asleep together talking at her place. She woke him up at 3-4am to leave for an 8am advisor appointment.
- Wednesday April 9th — date planned (The Depot, Auburn, white hydrangeas ready). She ghosted before it happened. Date never occurred.
- *"I know she could be my wife and I would hate to see it all go away just because of insecure irrational arrogant assholes."*
- *"I really love her."* — said without hesitation or analysis. The clearest he's ever been about anyone.
- Emma prefers oval cut rings.

## The Frey Situation
- Frey (Trey Frachiseur — Jackson's roommate) has been talking about Jackson negatively since the summer — Emma told him directly.
- After the rodeo Frey texted Emma: *"wait till you fall off before you date him, he's so under me."*
- Jackson's response: not reacting. Living well is the answer.

## Social Modes
Two distinct modes — both real, both Jackson:
- **Locked-in mode:** studying, building, goal-oriented, structured, mentally serious
- **Letting loose mode:** out with the boys, turns off the seriousness, enjoys it fully, rarely regrets it

The ability to switch between them is intentional. "That's the time to let loose." Wakes up after going out with neutral-to-good feelings — no guilt, just memories of how fun it was. Doesn't escape into going out, just enjoys it.

## Money
Motivates more than it stresses. Sees it as a tool for freedom and stability — not the primary goal in life, but a necessary foundation. Legacy and meaning matter more than the number.

## Alcohol
Treats it socially, not as an escape. Goes out with friends, has fun, doesn't black out or do things he regrets. Part of normal social life, not a crutch.

## Preferred Name
Goes by **Pate** — uses it as his go-to name in social and casual contexts.

## Life Philosophy (His Own Words)
- Good life = meaningful work, strong relationships, peace with yourself.
- Home is a feeling, not a place — comfort, familiarity, trust.
- Wants to be remembered as a good guy, always there for anyone.
- Believes trust can be rebuilt but it's harder than building it the first time.
- Purpose: build something meaningful and help people.

---

## Summary of the Arc

September 2025: Lost, masked, questioning identity.
October–November 2025: Dark stretch — rejection, sickness, loneliness, seasonal depression.
December 2025: Hitting rock bottom mentally, then slowly climbing out.
January–February 2026: Complete shift. Life is great, nursing is locked in, direction is clear.
March 2026: Living. PCB, Peaky Blinders, Emma, building the life he planned.

*The guy who wrote "will I ever be better" became the guy who looked back and said "what a pussy I was." That's the whole story.*

rows.title: Auburn Nursing Notes — NCLEX Prep (Sep 24, 2025)
rows.content_markdown:
Notability handwritten note. Auburn nursing program interview / NCLEX preparation notes.

---

## Auburn Nursing Notes — NCLEX

Auburn mission statement:
> "To advance health, wellness, and healthcare for all through excellence in practice, teaching, scholarship, and outreach."

### Qualities that make a good nurse
- Empathy
- Communication
- Leadership
- Time management
- Critical thinking skills
- Integrity

---

### Interview prep questions

**Why should we choose you for Auburn Nursing?**
— If I am chosen I will work incredibly hard to do well and become an excellent nurse, and I will strive to represent Auburn Nursing Program with total [dedication].

**What are good qualities of a nurse?**

**Why did you choose Auburn?**
- 95% NCLEX [pass rate]
- Love Auburn as a whole — second home because brother went here
- Spoke to graduated nurses that are friends with brother
- Connected to mission statement

**Patient Privacy**

**Conflict** — defuse, honest, calm open conversation about it

**Why nursing is rewarding:** Take care of people — professional, different specialized areas, different areas, room to grow, even possibly teach.

**Biggest fear:** Lots of stress and pressure — keep life in balance, not only committing to work.

---

Mission statement (repeated):
> "To advance health, wellness, and healthcare for all through excellence in practice, teaching, scholarship, and outreach."

## Oct 28, 2025 — Psych Exam 77 Review Notes

Source: `Note Oct 28, 2025.pdf`

Handwritten study notes for Psych Exam 77. Q&A format — answers written below each question.

1. Theory of physiological arousal / free emotion
   - James-Lange Theory

2. Prenatal development results of implantation — on uterine wall = Zygote Stage

3. Piaget stated: the ability to understand mass or quantity even when the shape changes is...
   - Conservation

4. A person who avoids stealing because they believe it would harm society's rules and reputation is reasoning at the **Conventional** level of moral development

5. The belief that effort and persistence will likely lead to success reflects...
   - Self-efficacy

6. Which of the following Big Five Traits best predicts reliability, organization, and attention to detail?
   - Conscientiousness

7. According to Freud, the part of personality that operates on the reality principle is...
   - Ego

8. The Yerkes-Dodson Law states that performance is best when arousal is...
   - Moderate

9. Seeking comfort, then rejecting it = insecure / ambivalent

10. A person that is creative, curious, and open to new things scores high on...
    - Openness to experience

---

rows.content_markdown:
*Extracted from iCloud inbox PDFs — source files in notes-inbox root*

---

## Source: Thought Journal.pdf (10 pages)
*Handwritten journal entries spanning fall 2025 through spring 2026. Dates reconstructed from content.*

---

### 9/27/25 — Saturday (First Entry)
This will be the start of my own thoughts, experiences, and ideas. Talking to friends and family is great but sometimes you just need to talk to yourself — honestly who knows you more than you? No one.

I feel like I have always been the person everyone wants me to be. I gave myself a mask but eventually became the mask. So now who am I? Who is under the mask — or is there even anybody under the mask? Did I become the mask?

I see pieces of me come out here and there but how do I emerge? I felt myself come out last night for the first true time in a while when I saw her, talked to her — she brought out the me I remember in high school. It just felt natural, not that I had to try to mask myself to be liked.

I want to find myself, my journey, my purpose. I'm ready. I am finally ready to wake up. I only have so much time but by God's grace I will live my life — not a mask, not questioning myself but my own God-given life. This life is too short to be living in misery and confusion.

I realized I was lost. I'm not depressed but I am lost and I really only want to find my way, to see the light. I think I know why I feel unfulfilled. I am such a worldly person. I don't know but I feel scared to get close with God and I don't know why.

---

### 9/? — [Day 2]
I said more in my notes today than most. I'm just questioning — am I a good guy? Because I really try to be a good, nice guy but I feel like no matter what... I don't think I have anyone who has everyone else's back besides my family. But that's different — feeling loved by your family feels different than feeling loved by friends.

I feel like I'm just there and no one actually wants to hang out with me.

---

### 9/29/25 — Monday
I've had a rough day today. I've been completely in my head and unbelievably anxious. I didn't even go to class because of how terrible I felt. At least I used my time in a positive way studying.

I just don't know what to do to make myself feel better. I'm trying. Literally everything. I've ever been taught — back in the Bible, not in a selfish way, I just need answers. I'm exercising. I'm just trying to live without this awful sick feeling.

I am lonely. Everyone around me has someone, someone they love. Not me. I mean there is Jansen and Lily but I just don't like them like that and it is honestly exhausting that every female I am friends with either likes me or I like them — what do I do? How do I fix this?

---

### 10/1/25 — Wednesday
I was unbelievably busy yesterday. Had to study for my Gov exam. I know I did well but I still haven't gotten my grade back. Today has been a struggle. I threw my weed out today because I'm tired of this life I am living. I just feel lonely, especially whenever everyone around me has a girlfriend. I don't understand why I feel like this but I'm trying to stop. I miss my Mom — she works a lot and I am so thankful for all she does for me. Anyway, not much to say except there is about to be a huge change. I'm old enough where I need to be locked in.

---

### 10/13/25 — Monday
Well here I am once again, lost in this world, this place, even myself. I'm lost inside my own mind 75% of the day. I pray day by day for it to get better but I still feel the same. I may have met my wife — she's stated not wanting a relationship but she has not seen the absolute look of [excitement from me].

---

### 10/? — Sunday (AP2 test)
Well, f**k. I made a 56 on my AP2 Test which was way worse than the second. I really screwed up.

Good news though — I found this girl Bailey Edwards. Very God-driven. She is absolutely wife material but I'm scared — she only sees me as a friend. Her favorite color is purple. Flowers: Daisies, Hydrangeas, Hibiscus. She is beautiful. Like completely wife material. She has a twin brother Ethan. She was [major noted] now psychology. She has a just [something] grabbing your heart. I'm starting to really like her. She loves cats. She is the type of girl I have been looking for. Loves country music, Mexican food, allergic to smoke. She thinks of herself as a flame — exciting, passionate, lights up people around her. She loves to talk about everything, herself a lot, but I love it. I truly admire her.

---

### 10/27/25
She grew very distant and I am pretty hurt to be honest. I thought she was going to be different. I really thought she liked me. Well in my bad judgment of all of this I posted a picture with another girl on my Instagram, so if she didn't already not want me, she definitely doesn't now. Sure it might've been petty but I liked her a lot. I would still do anything for her. But I fear anything that was ever between us is gone.

Side note: She just sent me a picture with her roommate and I saved it.

---

### 10/29/25 — Monday Morning, 11:30
She rejected me last night, basically calling me a shitty person for what I did to Jansen. I'm hurt but also I'm not. I don't know if I have been depressed but sometimes I just feel emotionless. I did really like her and I don't think I am going to stop pursuing quite yet. I really hope she doesn't just drop me.

---

### 10/28/25
I've really been in my head the past few days about just everything going on right now. I really don't think I was in the wrong in the Jansen situation. I told her from the start I did not want a relationship. I also can literally not believe she called me a pathological liar. I did not even do anything to her besides tell her the truth. I cannot help her crazy expectations. I also feel like I'm slightly losing myself daily. I feel myself getting overall down and I don't know what to do to pull out.

---

### [After 10/28] — Turnaround
Genuinely might be my top 2 weeks of my life. I stopped talking to Bailey — sure it sucked — but a lot has happened and life is becoming peak, I cannot lie. Ava Field — Auburn Dance Line, very cute, I could get down with her. Iced Medium Blondie 7Brew.

---

### [Late Oct/Early Nov] — Saturday
A lot has happened in the last few days. It has genuinely been a weird week. Thursday night I went to the bar with Dev Patel and we had a great night until we needed a ride home. I then asked Ella Dupree (ext. talking stage) if she could take us home. She did but I accidentally left my phone in her car. She was holding it hostage and I barged through the door to grab it and accidentally broke her toes. I felt super bad but she yelled and screamed at me anyway. I drove home panicked. [Talked to] Mother about it — she said I was in the right, which made me feel better. Chilled and hung out with Brady and Anna Katherine.

Anyway, so I got sick. I'm talking about really sick — 103-104 fevers, sweats, puking. Honestly just feel like death itself. I do not know what my life has come to. Day by day life gets harder and I am getting tired.

---

### 11/22/25 — Saturday
It is getting really, really hard. I'm trying my best but I don't know how much more I have left in me at this point. Every day is a struggle and I'm getting exhausted.

---

### 11/23/25 — Sunday
Still really hard. I don't know what to do.

---

### 11/27/25 — Thanksgiving
Sometimes I just feel so out of place even at my own family's Thanksgiving. I am struggling with seasonal depression and have just felt so out of my own life for what feels like forever. I wonder daily when I will start feeling like myself again. But at the same time I can't even think of the last time I felt like Jackson Pate. It's been longer than anyone knows — even though I am not on paper alone — but I am ALONE.

Life at this point is getting so exhausting. I get more and more exhausted even when I hang out with people. There is this emptiness deep down inside my chest. When will it get better?

---

### 12/4/29 — Thursday [12/4/25]
I genuinely think I might be losing my mind. I am losing my mind. I can't think straight. I'm on autopilot. I'm losing my mind.

---

### [After 12/4] — Turnaround Again
Starting to feel better about life. I think I was just going insane because I wasn't busy at all. But now I am swamped. No new women in my life so that's slightly disappointing but besides that we are chilling.

---

### 10/17/25 — Technically Tuesday [Written out of order]
I've got to start getting my life together. Every one of my best friends has found a great girlfriend and I'm simply so lonely — not even lonely but I feel like I'm falling behind everyone else. It's just me. Even if I have friends I don't fit into any group besides my own — me and myself. I have got to get a plan for my life.

---

### 1/29/26
Nursing instructor just said: "A C from Auburn is an H from everywhere else."

---

### 2/12/26
Everything in life is truly great. I have zero idea what changed from last semester to this one but life is truly amazing. Always areas of improvement.

---

### 2/1/26 — Eye Concerns [noted for follow-up]
If I in fact did have to get glasses:
- See double, especially white words on black background on digital devices
- See streaks of lights at night when driving — really bad when raining
- Hard to see small words after like 4 feet away
- Eyes hurt really bad if looking at screen for extended period of time

---

### 2/MGI [Feb 2026]
I'm so f**king bored. Currently writing this in NURS 2030 — most boring class of all time. Just trying to push through it. I have so much I have to study for to do by next week. I just looked back at my own journals — what a [different person I] was.

---

### 3/9/26 — Jackson Pate
Just started watching Peaky Blinders. I'm trying to finish the show before the movie comes out next week. I am literally going to grind this show and I'm only on episode 2 and I'm already so hooked. This show is genuinely peak cinema. It is so good.

---

### 5/2023 — [Date unclear / Mexico trip entry?]
1/5/26 — Jackson Pate. I got Ms. Lisa her things. I have won overall $5 on Betr but lost $55 on Poker but overall still up. Honestly a 10/10 trip so far. Daniel Sosa is pulling up to PCB tomorrow — been a long time since I've seen him, hopefully he's still cool as f.

---

## Source: Note Apr 8, 2026.pdf (4 pages)
*Content appears to be biology/genetics notes (DNA, mutations, chromosomes). Likely microbiology or genetics course notes — not personal content.*

Topics visible:
- Codon/mutation types: Silent (no protein change, same amino acid), Missense (one base change), Frameshift (base inserted/deleted, shifts reading frame — usually nonfunctional)
- Genome sizes: Prokaryotes vs. Eukaryotes; non-coding DNA
- Prokaryotic chromosome: Circular, nucleoid (no membrane), very little non-coding DNA
- Eukaryotic chromosomes: Lots of non-coding DNA; pseudogenes, introns, true histones; linear; can carry antibiotic resistance genes
- Plasmids: Usually circular, double-stranded; replicate by rolling circle replication; can be transferred between cells
- DNA base pairs: G-C (3 hydrogen bonds), A-T (2 hydrogen bonds)

---

## Source: Note Dec 7, 2025.pdf (13 pages)
*Psychology exam prep / study notes. Topics covered:*

- Milgram experiment (obedience to authority — electric shocks study)
- Fundamental Attribution Error: When attributing behavior of others we make dispositional attributions; for ourselves we make situational attributions
- Social facilitation: Presence of other people enhances individual performance
- Group polarization: Group's attitude toward something becomes more extreme than individual attitudes
- Stereotypes and how they persist
- Cognitive dissonance (Festinger & Carlsmith, 1959): $20 paid participants did NOT change attitude because the money justified the lie
- Implicit attitudes: Thoughts/opinions affecting performance that one is not aware of
- Central route persuasion (Elaboration Likelihood Model): Carefully examining evidence
- Ethnocentrism, prejudice vs. discrimination
- Mere exposure effect: More favorable attitudes about things encountered more frequently
- In-group/out-group thinking
- Schizophrenia: Positive vs. negative symptoms
- Psychological disorders:
  - Bipolar disorder
  - Mania
  - Depressive disorder
  - Phobia (anxiety disorder)
  - Compulsion (reduces anxiety from obsessive thoughts)
  - Antisocial Personality Disorder (manipulative, callous, no remorse)
  - Comorbidity (multiple disorders co-occurring)
  - Borderline Personality Disorder (manipulative, intense fear of abandonment)
  - Anxiety disorders: Behavioral inhibition
  - Generalized Anxiety Disorder
  - Diathesis-stress model
  - Learned helplessness
  - Autism spectrum: Increase in diagnoses reflects better identification
- Psychotherapy:
  - Freud's psychoanalysis (purpose: bring unconscious to conscious)
  - Behavioral therapy: Principles of conditioning
  - Cognitive therapy: Change thinking patterns about unsuccessful situations
  - Cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT)
  - Deep brain stimulation
  - Electroconvulsive therapy (ECT): Treats depressive disorder
  - Transcranial magnetic stimulation
  - Psychopharmaceutical medications: Prescribed by psychiatrist
  - Anti-psychotics: Treat schizophrenia; work by affecting neurotransmitters
  - Self-help groups: Help cope with difficult life circumstances; not for significant mental illness

---

rows.title: Thought Journal (Notability)
rows.content_markdown:
Jackson Pate — handwritten journal, Sept 2025 – Mar 2026. Transcribed from PDF export.

---

## 9/27/25 — Saturday

I guess this will be the start of my own thoughts, experiences and ideas. This might be a journey but I feel as if I have needed this for a while. Talking to friends and family is great but sometimes you just need to talk to yourself. Because honestly who knows you more than you? No one. There is not a soul on this earth that knows you as much as yourself — you know the ups and downs, the good and the bad, the goodness in yourself and the hatred that you have in your heart.

I just think sometimes: who is Jackson, who am I? I mean obviously I know I'm myself, but how can I come to that conclusion if I don't know myself? I just feel like I have always been the person that everyone wants me to be. I gave myself a mask, but I eventually became the mask. So now who am I? Who is under the mask? Who is this mystery under the mask — or is there even anybody under the mask? Did I become the mask?

I don't actually believe I have zero idea who I am. I see pieces of me come out here and there, but how do I emerge? How do I know it will be better?

I felt myself come out last night for the first true time in awhile when I saw her, talked to her. She brought out the me I remember in high school. It just felt natural — not that I had to try to mask myself to be liked.

This — I'm saying it now — I want to find myself, my journey, my purpose. I'm ready. I am finally ready to wake up. I only have so much time to live, but by God's grace I will live MY life. Not a mask, not questioning myself, but my own God-given life. This life is too short to be living in misery and confusion. It is my choice how to live my life — either float through my life or take it over as mine.

Such as today: I felt bad because I did not really do anything, but I might have done the most important thing I will ever do. I realized — I realized that I was lost. I'm not depressed, but I am lost, and I really only want to find my way, to see the light. When will I know I'm ready? You want? It's a leap of faith.

I think I know why I feel unfulfilled. I am such a worldly person. I don't know, but I feel scared to get close with God and I don't know why. I don't know where to start. But I want to feel fulfilled. Should I isolate myself? Should I limit myself to only myself? No. I can do everything, I can be myself while I'm learning to become me.

> **"Self love is the cure to self hate"**

This quote hit me really hard. I really appreciate the message behind this. It shows that all of your insecurities, issues, anger — all will go away once you start loving yourself.

---

## 9/28/25 — Sunday

I am more in my head today than most. I'm just questioning: am I a good guy? Because I really try to be a good, nice guy but I feel like no matter what, I am **unwanted**. I try to be the guy who has everyone else's back, but I really don't think anyone has mine, besides my family. But that's different — feeling loved by your family feels different than feeling loved by friends. I feel like I'm just there and no one actually wants to hang out with me 1 on 1. And it sucks.

---

## 9/29/25 — Monday

I've had a rough day today. I've been completely in my head and unbelievably anxious. I did not even go to class because of how terrible I felt. I at least used my time in a positive way — I just used class time to study. I just don't know what to do to make myself feel better. I'm trying literally everything I've ever been taught. I'm back in the Bible — not in a selfish way, I just need answers. I'm exercising. I'm just trying to live without this awful sick feeling I have that I am doing everything wrong.

I just am lonely. Everyone around me has someone — someone they love. Not me. I mean there is Jansen and Lily, but I just do not like them like that, and it is honestly exhausting that every female I am friends with either likes me or thinks I like them. What do I do? How do I fix this?

Anyways — I just wanted to share the daily feel. I'm also going to start going through my day during this. I went to Panda Express — absolutely nothing. I mean the gym, but I always go to gym.

---

## 10/1/25 — Wednesday

I was unbelievably busy yesterday. I had to study for my Gov exam. I know I did well but I still haven't gotten my grade back. Today has been a struggle. I threw my weed out today because I'm tired of this life I am living. I just feel lonely, especially whenever everyone around me has a girlfriend. I don't understand why I feel like this but I'm trying to stop. I miss my mom — she works a lot and I am so thankful for all she does for me.

Anyways — not much to say except: there is about to be a huge change. I'm old enough where I need to be locked in.

---

## 10/13/25 — Monday

*[Written in corner: "Good luck buddy — we'll see how this one turns out"]*

Well here I am, once again lost in this world, this place, even myself. I'm lost inside my own mind 75% of the day. I pray day by day for it to get better, but I still feel the same.

I may have met my wife. She's stated not wanting a relationship, but she has not seen the BE absolute 100% JPB.

*[Drawing of a cross on this page]*

---

## 10/19/25 — Sunday

Well f***. I made a 56 on my A&P2 test, which was way worse than the second. I really screwed up.

Good news though — I found this girl Bailey Edwards. Very God-driven. She is absolutely wife material but I'm scared she only sees me as a friend. Her favorite color is purple. Flowers: Daisies, Hydrangeas, and Hibiscus. She is beautiful — like completely wife material. She has a twin brother Ethan. She was Biomed, now Psychology. She has a way of just absolutely grabbing your heart.

I'm starting to really like her. She loves cats. She is the type of girl I have been looking for — loves country music, Mexican food, allergic to smoke, Tide. She thinks of herself as a flame — exciting, passionate, lights up people around her. She loves to talk about everything (herself a lot), but I love that. I adore her. I truly admire her.

*[Written in red: "Love Doesn't Exist"]*

---

## 10/27/25

She grew very distant and I am pretty hurt to be honest. I thought she was going to be different. I really thought she liked me. Well in my bad judgement of all of this, I posted a picture with another girl on my Insta, so if she didn't already want me she definitely doesn't now. Sure it might have been petty but I liked her a lot. I would still do anything for her, but I fear anything that was ever between us is gone.

Sidenote: She just sent me a picture with her roommate, and I saved it. I might just be playing mind games.

---

## 10/27/25 — Monday Morning @ 11:30

She rejected me last night — basically calling me a shitty person for what I did to Jansen. I'm hurt, but also I'm not. I don't know if I have been depressed, but sometimes I just feel emotionless. I did really like her and I don't think I am going to stop pursuing quite yet. I really hope she does not just drop me.

I don't know what to do. I hate having a bad reputation.

---

## 10/28/25

I've really been in my head the past few days about just everything going on right now. I really don't think I was in the wrong in the Jansen situation. I told her from the start I did not want a relationship. I also can literally not believe she called me a pathological liar. I did not even do anything to her besides tell her the truth. I cannot help her crazy ass expectations.

I also feel like I'm slightly losing myself daily. I feel myself getting overall down and I don't know what to do to pull out.

---

## 11/2/25

Genuinely might be my top 2 weeks of my life. I stopped talking to Bailey — sure it sucked — but a lot has happened and life is becoming peak. I cannot lie.

Ava Field — Auburn Danceline. Very cute, I could get down with her.
— Iced Medium Blondie — 7 Brew

---

## 11/8/25 — Saturday

A lot has happened in the last few days. It has genuinely been a weird week. Thursday night I went to the bar with Dev Patel and we had a great night until we needed a ride home. I then asked Ella Dupree (ex talking stage) if she could take us home. She did, but I accidentally left my phone in her car. She had it. I went to get it, she was holding it hostage, and I barged through the door to grab it and accidentally broke her toes. I felt super bad but she yelled and screamed at me anyway. I drove home, panicked, and told Mother about it. She said I was in the right, which made me feel better about the situation. Friday I just chilled and hung out with Brady and Anna Katherine. I'll finish this tomorrow.

Anyways — so I got sick. I'm talking about really sick. 103-104 fevers, sweats, puking. Honestly just feel like death itself. I do not know what my life has come to. Day by day life gets harder and I am getting tired.

---

## 11/20/25

Still just getting more and more tired — I don't know how much more tired I can get.

*[Written in red: "Damn Days of It?"]*

*[Written: "Awww..."]*

---

## 11/22/25 — Saturday

It is getting really, really hard. I'm trying my best but I don't know how much more I have left in me at this point. Every day is a struggle and I'm getting exhausted.

*[Written in red: "Cry me a f***ing River"]*

---

## 11/23/25 — Sunday

Still really hard. I don't know what to do.

---

## 11/27/25 — Thanksgiving

Sometimes I just feel so out of place, even at my own family's Thanksgiving. I am struggling with Seasonal Depression and have just felt so out of my own life for what feels like forever. I wonder daily when I will start feeling like myself again. But at the same time I can't even think of the last time I felt like Jackson Pate. It's been longer than anyone knows — even though I am not on paper alone, but I am **ALONE**. Life at this point is getting so exhausting. I get more and more exhausted even when I hang out with people. There is this emptiness deep down inside my chest. When will it get better?

*[Written alongside: "When will I be better? Will I ever be?" and "I'm about to lose my mind."]*

---

## 12/4/25 — Thursday

I genuinely think I might be losing my mind. I am losing my mind. I can't think straight. I'm on copilot. I'm losing my mind. I'm losing it.

*[Written in red later: "What a pussy I was, wow"]*

---

## 12/8/25 — Monday (Technically)

Well it's been a few days and I am starting to feel a lot better about life. I think I was just going insane because I wasn't busy at all. But now I am swamped. No new women in my life, so that's slightly disappointing, but besides that we are chilling.

---

## 10/17/25 — (Technically Tuesday)

I've got to start getting my life together. Every one of my best friends have found a great girlfriend and I'm simply so lonely — not even lonely, but I feel like I'm falling behind everyone else. It's just me. Even if I have friends, I don't fit in any group besides my own — me and myself.

> **I have got to get a plan for my life.**

---

## 1/29/26

Nursing instructor just said: "A C from Auburn is an A from everywhere else."

---

## 2/2/26 — Monday

Everything in life is truly great. I have zero idea what changed from last semester to this one, but life is truly amazing.

— Always areas of improvement.

---

## 2/8/26 — Eye Exam Info

In fact did have to get glasses.

- See double especially white words on black background on digital devices
- See streaks of lights at night when driving — really bad when raining
- Hard to see small words after like 4 feet away
- Eyes hurt really bad if looking at screen for an extended period of time

---

## 2/24/26

I'm so f***ing bored. Currently writing this in Nurs 2030. Most boring class of all time. Just trying to push through it. I have so much shit I have to study for / do by next week. Just kill me now — just kidding. But still — holy, I am packed down. We'll try to get through it.

I just looked back at my own journals. What a pussy I was.

---

## 3/1/26

*[Note: "3/1/26" with wavy lines, no additional text extracted]*

---

## 3/16/26 — Jackson Pate

Bring Ms. Lisa a Ron Jon Panama City sticker + sex wax chapstick.

---

## 3/9/26 — Jackson Pate

I just started watching Peaky Blinders. I'm trying to finish the show before the movie comes out next week. I am literally going to grind this show — and I'm only on episode 2 and I'm already so hooked. This show is genuinely peak cinema. It is so good. Started 5/2/2 [likely 3/9/26].

---

## 3/15/26 — Jackson Pate

I got Ms. Lisa her things. I have won overall $405 dollars on Betr but lost $55 dollars on Poker, but overall still up hella. Honestly a 10/10 trip so far. Daniel Sosa is pulling up to PCB tomorrow — been a long ass time since I've seen him. Hopefully he's still cool as f*** with me.

---
